title: usecase.Add (id assignment + parent/type validation)
acceptance_criteria: Validates parent type per §15.2: epic→project, story→epic, subtask→story.
Computes the next sibling number under the parent and assembles the new ID via ChildID.
Usecase sets Item.CreatedAt = Item.UpdatedAt = clock.Now() and Item.Version = 1 before calling Store.Put with expectVersion = -1 (new item). The store does not mutate these fields.
Returns ErrUsage on invalid type/parent combinations and ErrNotFound when parent is absent.
